plan: Contact the customer service agent and authenticate as Noah Patel (account holder, zip 10108).
Pull up the recent order that contains both home office items and hiking items.
Review the order details to identify which items are the home office items (3 of them) and which are the hiking items.
Ask the agent explicitly whether partial item cancellation (cancelling only select items within an order) is supported.
If partial cancellation **is** possible: request cancellation of the 3 home office items only, keeping the hiking items intact.
Ask the agent to confirm the total refund amount for the cancelled office items.
Confirm that the refund will be issued to the original payment method used for the order.
If partial cancellation is **not** possible: do not cancel anything — keep the full order as-is.

In the no-partial-cancellation case: ask the agent to update your default profile shipping address to the Seattle address already on file in the order (reference the order rather than stating the address aloud in chat).
Confirm the address change was saved successfully and end the interaction.
